intro: W6 Fri quality day #2 per §4.C — 30 min progression: ease in at Z1, build down, hold the last 10 min at Marathon pace (8:30/mi, §4.A). No VO2max in Base yet; this is the controlled aerobic-power session.
No lift today (Wed is the standalone Hyp A under the §2.A revision; Sat is Hyp B). Cardio only.
Discipline is the negative split — don't open at M. Build into it so the last 10 min is the only hard part. Anchor M to pace + RPE, not HR (Adj #9 — off-191 zones skew low for running).

flags: Anchor the M block to pace 8:30/mi + RPE, not HR (Adj #9). HR will run above the off-191 ≤155 cap — that's the rower-test artifact; expect ~165–178 on the M finish by feel, don't chase a number. MHR retest still owed W6–W8.
Progression, not a tempo from the gun — first ~20 min build easy → M; hold 8:30/mi only for the last 10. Pace honesty held Thu (10:30/mi); open this one honest at the Z1 floor.

Optional: this is the Fri tempo slot — good first outing to break in the Zoom Fly 6 (0 mi; carbon plate wants 20–30 min easy first, which the build portion covers). Watch calves/Achilles (6mm drop). Or keep the Vomero if you'd rather not test shoes on a quality day.
Yellow/red AM → downgrade to easy 30 min, push quality to Sat-adjacent or skip (§11.C). Daily check overrides the prescription.
cardio.workout: 30 min progression: ~20 min build from Z1 down to M, then last 10 min @ M pace. Treadmill 1% or flat outdoor.

targets.pace: build 10:15 → 8:30/mi over first 20 min; last 10 min @ 8:30/mi (M, §4.A)
targets.hr: by pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9); M block ~165–178 expected by feel; off-191 ≤155 cap is artifact
targets.cadence: 165–172 easy build → 175–182 on the M block (§2.A)

cardio.warmup: Built-in — first 3–5 min walk into easy Z1, then begin the build. No separate WU needed for a progression.
cardio.cooldown: 5–10 min easy / Z1; Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 + McGill Big 3 5-3-1 (SI prehab on quality days)
cues: Negative-split it — every 5 min a touch quicker; the M block should feel earned, not survived
M pace 8:30 = 'comfortably hard', RPE ~6, breathing rhythmic — if it's RPE 7+ you've drifted toward T, ease to 8:30
Cadence climbs with pace: 165–172 easy → 175–182 on the M finish, don't force it early
Report AM / during / post SI status post-session
